children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish for each participating jurisdiction a HOME Investment Trust Fund, which shall be an account (or accounts as provided in ) for use solely to invest in affordable housing within the participating jurisdiction’s boundaries or within the boundaries of contiguous jurisdictions in joint projects which serve residents from both jurisdictions in accordance with the provisions of this part.section 12749(c) of this title
funds allocated or reallocated to the participating jurisdiction under , andsection 12747 of this title
any payment or repayment made pursuant to .section 12749 of this title
funds drawn from the HOME Investment Trust Fund by the participating jurisdiction,
any penalties assessed by the Secretary under section 12754 of this title.1So in original. Probably should be section “12753”.1

children.heading: Certification
children.label: d Certification
children.text: A participating jurisdiction may draw funds from its HOME Investment Trust Fund, but not to exceed the remaining line of credit, only after providing certification that the funds shall be used pursuant to the participating jurisdiction’s approved housing strategy and in compliance with all requirements of this subchapter. When such certification is received, the Secretary shall immediately disburse such funds in accordance with the form of the assistance determined by the participating jurisdiction.

children.heading: Investment within 15 days
children.label: e Investment within 15 days
children.text: The participating jurisdiction shall, not later than 15 days after funds are drawn from the jurisdiction’s HOME Investment Trust Fund, invest such funds, together with any interest earned thereon, in the affordable housing for which the funds were withdrawn.

children.heading: No interest or fees
children.label: f No interest or fees
children.text: The Secretary shall not charge any interest or levy any other fee with regard to funds in a HOME Investment Trust Fund.

children.heading: Expiration of right to draw funds
children.label: g Expiration of right to draw funds
children.text: If any funds becoming available to a participating jurisdiction under this subchapter are not placed under binding commitment to affordable housing within 24 months after the last day of the month in which such funds are deposited in the jurisdiction’s HOME Investment Trust Fund, the jurisdiction’s right to draw such funds from the HOME Investment Trust Fund shall expire. The Secretary shall reduce the line of credit in the participating jurisdiction’s HOME Investment Trust Fund by the expiring amount and shall reallocate the funds by formula in accordance with .section 12747(d) of this title

children.heading: Administrative provision
children.label: h Administrative provision
children.text: The Secretary shall keep each participating jurisdiction informed of the status of its HOME Investment Trust Fund, including the status of amounts under various stages of commitment.
